chapter_title.ar: بَابٌ فِي أَنَّ السَّكِينَةَ هِيَ الْإِيمَانُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 10 – Regarding the tranquility (Re 48:4) – it is the faith

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/73)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/73)
text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ هُوَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلَ السَّكِينَةَ فِي قُلُوبِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ قَالَ هُوَ الْإِيمَانُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hafs Bin Al Bakhtary and Hisham Bin Salim, and someone other than these two,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [48:4] He it is Who sent down tranquillity into the hearts of the Momineen (plural of Momin). Heasws said: ‘It is the faith’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hafs ibn al-Bakhtari and Hisham ibn Salim and people other than the two from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following:“About the words of Allah, the Majestic, the Glorious, ‘It is He who has sent serenity (al-Sakinah) into the hearts of the believers,’ [48:4] the Imam said, ‘It (serenity) is belief.’”
